title: En schlächte Tag
desc: A bad day and a friend who listens

sn.s: Hüt han ich en würkli schlächte Tag ghaa.
sn.e: Today I had a really bad day.

sn.s: Uf de Arbet isch alls schief gange.
Ich bi müed und voll Stress.
sn.e: I'm tired and full of stress.

sn.s: De Lukas merkt grad, dass öppis nöd stimmt.
sn.e: Lukas notices right away that something's off.

sn.s: "Was isch los? Du gsehsch fertig us," seit er.
sn.e: "What's wrong? You look done in," he says.

sn.s: Ich erzähl em vo mim Problem.
sn.e: I tell him about my problem.

sn.s: Er lost guet zue und underbricht mich nöd.
sn.e: He listens well and doesn't interrupt me.

sn.s: "Das tönt würkli streng," seit er mitfühlend.
sn.e: "That sounds really tough," he says sympathetically.

sn.s: "Aber morn isch wider en neue Tag."

sn.e: "Thanks for listening to me," I say.

sn.s: "Defür sind Fründe da," seit er eifach.
sn.e: "That's what friends are for," he says simply.

sn.s: Mit eme Fründ rede macht alls liechter.
sn.e: Talking with a friend makes everything lighter.

sn.s: Es Problem teilt isch es halbs Problem.
sn.e: A problem shared is half a problem.
